nasb.text: They made two gold filigree settings and two gold rings, and put the two rings on the two ends of the breastpiece.

esv.text: And they made two settings of gold filigree and two gold rings, and put the two rings on the two edges of the breastpiece.

cnv.text: 又做兩個金槽和兩個金環，把兩個金環安放在胸牌的兩端，

ccb.text: 又造两个金框和两个金环，把金环安在胸牌两端。
